title: Family Keys Illustration
description: This piece was created as a personal gift for a family member, with each illustrated key representing an individual person within the family. Every key was designed with unique symbols, shapes, and details to reflect that person’s personality, energy, and role within the family.

highlightBox.title: Project Snapshot
highlightBox.body: This piece was created as a personal gift for a family member, with each illustrated key representing an individual person within the family. Every key was designed with unique symbols, shapes, and details to reflect that person’s personality, energy, and role within the family.

body:
This piece was created as a personal gift for a family member, with each illustrated key representing an individual person within the family. Every key was designed with unique symbols, shapes, and details to reflect that person’s personality, energy, and role within the family.

Rather than using literal portraits, I chose symbolism to tell the story. Each key acts as a visual metaphor, showing how every family member holds something different yet essential. The central key represents the emotional core of the family, with surrounding keys forming a connected but distinct set, much like the family itself.

This project allowed me to combine illustration, storytelling, and emotional design. It demonstrates my ability to translate relationships and personality traits into meaningful visuals, creating artwork that is personal, thoughtful, and narrative driven rather than purely decorative.
